_description: Tracks parallel batch work across sessions. When a session claims a subset of accounts for research/drafting, it registers here. Other sessions query this before claiming accounts to avoid duplication.
_usage: Before claiming accounts for a new batch, check this file. If accounts you want are not in active_claims, add yours. Clear your entry when your subset is done (merged into the batch tracker).

_example_active_claims.note: Epicor x2, BeyondTrust x4, Northern Trust x6

_parallelization_rules.t1_build_and_t2_draft: T1 batch building and T2 drafting for OLD batches (5+ days ago) CAN run in parallel — no file conflicts. T2 drafting reads static files; T1 building creates new files.
_parallelization_rules.t1_send_and_t2_draft: T1 sending (Apollo Tasks tab) and T2 drafting CAN run in parallel. T1 sends update MASTER_SENT_LIST + tracker badges; T2 drafting reads different tracker files.
_parallelization_rules.two_t1_sessions_same_batch: Two sessions cannot research/draft for the SAME accounts in the same batch. Use this file to claim account subsets.
_parallelization_rules.enrollment_serialized: Apollo enrollment (API calls) must be serialized — one session at a time. Use file lock on MASTER_SENT_LIST.csv.
